analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet denounces Mike Pompeo/US as spreading lies and a 'political virus,' coercing others into an anti-China stance for US gain, and predicts failure. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Yes. The tweet portrays the US (via Pompeo) as hostile, deceitful, manipulative, and harming others for its own interests, casting China as the target of unfair attacks. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — No. The tweet does not highlight China's cooperative or benevolent actions; it focuses on criticizing the US. CH3 (China has an epic history) — No reference to history or resilience. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — No. No defense of China's political system or domestic values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) — No performance claims. CH6 (China’s culture/nature) — Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH1 is promoted.
